title: Ubiquiti Pro XG 10 PoE switch
description: The UniFi Switch USW-Pro-XG-10-PoE is a managed L3 PoE switch with a switching capacity of 240 Gbps , (10) 10-Gigabit LAN ports and two SFP+ (1/10Gbps) ports. All Ethernet ports support PoE+++ 802.3af/at/bt PoE-Out with an output power of up to 90W/port and a total PoE budget of 400 W . The ports feature Etherlighting , which allows you to illuminate ports in different colors to indicate port location, speed/connection, and VLAN. The switch is powered via 230V AC, and the USP RPS DC port serves… (10) 10G ports â supports 802.3af/at/bt PoE+++ (90W/port) (2) 1/10G SFP+ ports 400 W PoE budget Etherlighting â visual indication of port information Rack-mountable Management via UniFi Network Server The USW-Pro-XG-10-PoE does not have a web interface but is centrally managed through the UniFi Network Server with support for the UniFi mobile app. It offers an extensive set of advanced L2 and L3 switching protocols and features, including per-port operation modes (switching, mirroring, or aggregation). The UniFi Network Server and mobile app allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all switch functions through a graphical user interface from anywhere Device Power cable Rack-mount brackets
